original: Vitamin D supplementation significantly reduces the risk of acute respiratory infections. A meta-analysis of 25 randomized controlled trials found a 12% reduction in infection risk. The protective effect is strongest in individuals who are severely deficient.
corrupted: It is false that vitamin D supplementation significantly reduces the risk of acute respiratory infections. A meta-analysis of 25 randomized controlled trials found a 12% reduction in infection risk. The protective effect is strongest in individuals who are severely deficient.
